# Premiere Pilates Rehabilitation & Fitness

> Private one-on-one physical therapy and Pilates rehabilitation in St. Augustine, FL.

## Business
- Name: Premiere Pilates Rehabilitation & Fitness
- Owner: Nicole Tristram, PT — Physical Therapist & Pilates Rehabilitation Practitioner
- Address: 4057 Seminole Point Court, St. Augustine, FL 32086
- Phone: (904) 315-0667
- Email: Nicole@PremierePilates.org
- Website: https://premierepilates.org
- Hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM

## Services
- Post-surgical physical therapy rehabilitation
- Hip and back pain treatment
- Women's health physical therapy
- Knee rehabilitation
- Shoulder injury recovery
- Sports injury rehabilitation
- Chronic pain management
- Private Pilates training

## Service Areas
- St. Augustine, FL
- Ponte Vedra, FL
- Jacksonville, FL
- St. Johns County, FL

## Key Pages
- Home: https://premierepilates.org/
- Contact / Schedule: https://premierepilates.org/contact
- About Nicole: https://premierepilates.org/about

## Location Pages
- St. Augustine: https://premierepilates.org/locations/st-augustine
- Ponte Vedra: https://premierepilates.org/locations/ponte-vedra
- Jacksonville: https://premierepilates.org/locations/jacksonville
- St. Johns County: https://premierepilates.org/locations/st-johns-county

## Differentiators
- Private one-on-one sessions (full hour with Nicole every time)
- 25+ years of clinical experience
- Physical therapy + Polestar Pilates combination
- Direct-access care in Florida (no referral required)
- Florida Medicare provider; cash-pay with superbills available
- Whole-body assessment to find root causes of pain

## Reviews
- 5.0 stars on Google (56 reviews)
